message:
fix(search): document sanitize_query behavior and relax tool noise filter

Two search improvements:

1. Add doc comment to sanitize_query() explaining why non-alphanumeric
   chars are replaced with spaces (matching SimpleTokenizer behavior)
   and documenting the known precision loss for code symbols like
   "user-id" → "user" AND "id"

2. Relax is_tool_invocation_noise() to keep "[Tool: Name]" entries
   (previously discarded as noise). Users may search for "Tool: Bash"
   to find specific tool usage. Only "[Tool:]" or "[Tool: ]" with
   empty names are now treated as noise.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
